extraction.one_line_summary: BARDET Romain won Stage 12 after ARU Fabio attacked in the final 200 meters, dropping FROOME Chris for the first time since 2012 and taking yellow by 6 seconds.
tactical_patterns: ARU Fabio's attack in final 200m was first successful move against FROOME Chris since 2012, revealing vulnerability on ultra-steep finishes.
KIRYIENKA Vasil led on Port d'Alès penultimate climb, allowing LANDA Mikel and NIEVE Mikel to conserve energy for final climb.
LANDA Mikel appeared stronger than FROOME Chris on Peyresourde, suggesting team hierarchy tension or strategic conservation by FROOME.
BARGUIL Warren extended mountain jersey lead by attacking for KOM points mid-stage while GC contenders marked each other.
Peloton waited after NIEVE Mikel/FROOME Chris camper crash on descent right turn, suggesting respect for race leader over tactical opportunism.

rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: First rider to drop FROOME in five years, attacked decisively in final 200m on 20%+ gradient to take yellow
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Admitted lacking legs in finale, dropped for first time since 2012 despite Sky controlling race
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: positive: Looked stronger than FROOME on Peyresourde, barely breathing while FROOME struggled, potential protected rider tension
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: Stage win on brutal 20%+ finish suggests explosive power on ultra-steep gradients superior to FROOME
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: positive: Went all-in with ARU to create first clear gap on FROOME, showing willingness to attack
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: Struggled entire stage with two broken bones in left arm, compromised ARU's team support
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Dropped on Peyresourde, now 4:01 behind, appeared to have nothing left when chatting with teammate
rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: positive: Extended KOM lead to 40 points by tactically attacking for points while GC riders marked each other
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Early attack cost him, paid price later in stage, signs of decline
rider_signals.NIEVE Mikel: negative: Crashed into camper on descent right turn taking excessive risks when peloton unlikely to attack
rider_signals.BENNETT George: positive: California winner showing form, mentioned among strong climbers on finale
rider_signals.MEINTJES Louis: positive: Fifth on stage, closing gap on YATES Simon in white jersey, strong climber emerging
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Solid defense of white jersey, prevented MEINTJES from gaining significant time despite strong finish
